channel.title: Mlflow on Matthew Norberg's Data Engineering Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mlflow on Matthew Norberg's Data Engineering Blog

item.title: Boston Code Camp Recap: Building AI Agents in Databricks
item.author: mattnorberg4@gmail.com (Matthew Norberg)
item.description: A recap of my session at Boston Code Camp, covering how to build, deploy, and test AI agents in Databricks using the Responses Agent framework. Includes links to the slides and code on GitHub.
